---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect or unexpected behaviour
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the browser console or WordPress admin.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Plugin version | e.g. 0.6.8.2 |
| WordPress version | e.g. 6.7.2 |
| PHP version | e.g. 8.2 |
| Divi version | e.g. 5.x |
| Browser (if UI bug) | e.g. Chrome 123 |
| Hosting environment | e.g. SiteGround, Local WP, WP Engine |

## Screenshots / Error Messages

If applicable, paste error messages or attach screenshots here.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
